name: Alan King
abstract: Alan King (born Irwin Alan Kniberg; December 26, 1927 – May 9, 2004) was an American comedian, actor and satirist known for his biting wit and often angry humorous rants. He was also a serious actor who appeared in a number of films and television shows.

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: Judy Garland at the Met with Alan King -- we played the Metropolitan Theater in New York... Alan King was also in it. He did comedy.

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Barbutti
about_quotes.evidence: George came to Vegas to do a comedy routine at Ceasar’s Palace, and he worked with Milton Berle and Alan King and Cosby.
